fixes.description: Focus-visible accent: added focus-visible:text-accent to every interactive element that has hover:text-accent
elements: HeaderMainItem.tsx: submenu trigger button cn() key
HeaderMain.php: desktop search submit button class (replace_all — matched both desktop and mobile buttons identically)
HeaderMain.tsx: mobile SEP link cn() key
HeaderMain.tsx: desktop + mobile search submit buttons (replace_all)
HeaderMain.tsx: desktop CTA link cn() key

fixes.description: Outline fix: removed dead 'outline outline-0 outline-transparent' base state; added focus-visible:outline-solid to override global outline-dotted; kept focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2
fixes.note: HeaderMain.php/.tsx SEP links and search buttons did not have outline classes — only focus-visible:text-accent was added to those.

fixes.description: Dropdown min-width: removed conflicting md:min-w-max from submenu container; kept md:min-w-[calc(100%+3rem)] which provides the correct minimum width (p-6 = 1.5rem each side = 3rem total)
